title: Flail Knight
move_pattern: Starts with Ram. Then randomly selects from: Breaker (cannot repeat consecutively), Flail (weight 2), or Ram (weight 2).
notes: Breaker (WAR_CHANT) applies 3 Strength to itself and cannot be used twice in a row. Flail and Ram each have weight 2, making them twice as likely as Breaker to be selected.
